control.description-key: LeanToolKit escalation viewer — the actions escalated to this board, grouped by their source card, with one-tap acknowledge and comment capture written back to the central actions table. Feed it Filter(Actions, Escalated = true).

property.name: actionsInputJSON
property.description-key: The escalated actions for this board, pre-filtered from the central actions table: JSON(Filter(Actions, Escalated = true, ...)). Canonical action array.

property.name: actionsOutputJSON
property.description-key: The action set with acknowledgements, comments and status edits. Each action keeps the Instance Id of its SOURCE card — upsert by action id in OnChange.

property.name: sourcesJSON
property.description-key: Friendly names for the source cards, keyed by instance id: [{instanceId, label}]. Unmapped actions group under their card type.

property.name: settingsJSON
property.description-key: Consolidated configuration: {title, prompts, readOnly, theme:{background,foreground,accent,legend,font}, config:{...card-specific keys named after the discrete inputs...}}. Settings are the base; a non-empty discrete text input overrides its key (enum/boolean inputs: the settings key wins when present).

property.name: resetTrigger
property.description-key: Reloads the control from Actions Input whenever this value CHANGES (e.g. Set(varReset, Text(Now()))).

property.name: viewerName
property.description-key: The display name of the current user (e.g. User().FullName) — stamped on acknowledgements and comments.

property.name: viewerId
property.description-key: The id of the current user (e.g. their email or Dataverse GUID) — stamped on acknowledgements and comments.

property.name: peopleJSON
property.description-key: People available for action reassignment in the edit dialog: [{whoId, who}].

property.name: cardTitle
property.description-key: Optional title bar (e.g. Escalations). Leave empty for no chrome at all.

property.name: prompts
property.description-key: Optional coaching prompts: plain text, or JSON array of strings / {field, hint} objects. Shown as the empty state and an info popover.

property.name: backgroundColor
property.description-key: Background colour (any CSS colour or hex). Default white.

property.name: foregroundColor
property.description-key: Text / line colour. Default rich black.

property.name: accentColor
property.description-key: Accent colour for badges and highlights. Default rich black.

property.name: titleBarColor
property.description-key: Background fill for just the title bar, distinct from the card background - use one colour across related cards to visually associate them on a board. Empty = no strip fill.

property.name: legendColors
property.description-key: JSON array or CSV: [unused, Done] colours used by the action rows. Default green.

property.name: fontFamily
property.description-key: Font family (or comma-separated font stack) for all text.

property.name: pngExport
property.description-key: Read-only PNG snapshot as a data URI, for an Image control or Power Automate.

property.name: svgExport
property.description-key: Read-only SVG snapshot markup, refreshed after each change. Use as an Image control source via "data:image/svg+xml;utf8, " & EncodeUrl(Self.Output) or store next to the card.
